channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: microsoft / BitNet
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 33,913 → 34,209 (+296) | Ranked #1
Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs
Language: Python 2,227 stars today

item.title: langflow-ai / openrag
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 2,225 → 2,370 (+145) | Ranked #2
OpenRAG is a comprehensive, single package Retrieval-Augmented Generation platform built on Langflow, Docling, and Opensearch.
Language: Python 905 stars today

item.title: promptfoo / promptfoo
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 15,227 → 15,441 (+214) | Ranked #6
Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration.
Language: TypeScript 1,668 stars today

item.title: msitarzewski / agency-agents
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 39,881 → 40,932 (+1051) | Ranked #7
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
Language: Shell 5,745 stars today
